description: All projects within a shared geographic and institutional context.
title: Ecosystem

@id.description: An Internationalized Resource Identifier (IRI). May be a full IRI or a compact IRI (CURIE) resolved by the JSON-LD context.
@id.title: IRI

meanNormalizedBurden.description: Average project normalized burden across projects in this ecosystem.
meanNormalizedBurden.title: Mean Normalized Burden

meanTimeToValue.description: Average project time to delivered value across projects in this ecosystem.
meanTimeToValue.title: Mean Time to Value

stdTimeToValue.description: Standard deviation of project time to delivered value across projects in this ecosystem.
stdTimeToValue.title: Std. Dev. Time to Value
